description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a camouflage green and dark gray paint scheme, accented by red stars on the wings and tail, indicating Soviet or Russian origin. The aircraft features a streamlined fuselage with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit covered by a clear canopy. Its wings are straight and low-mounted, with no visible winglets, and the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a conventional arrangement. The landing gear is of the taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine cowling is painted red, matching the tips of the propeller blades. The overall design suggests a World War II-era fighter aircraft, built primarily from metal with some glass components for the cockpit.
description: A green and gray camouflaged, single-propeller military airplane with red star insignias, low-mounted straight wings, and a taildragger landing gear. The enclosed cockpit sits forward on the fuselage under a clear canopy.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the red nose cone, propeller, forward cockpit canopy, and main landing gear under the wings.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the large red star on the tail, the tail wheel, and the full span of the left wing.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the right wing's red star, the tail section, and the cockpit canopy from behind.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the propeller, nose cone, cockpit canopy, and the main landing gear under the right wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no winglets or visible dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
